series_metadata.series_title: Quarterly Reports to the Controlling Board
series_metadata.series_description: Involves records of Emergency School Advancement Loan (ESAL) approval, repayment, and interest on a quarterly basis.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain ten years. When paper is converted to machine readable format, check for accuracy and completeness prior to discarding the paper. ; Electronic: Retain ten years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
